entity.label: Ezer
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: One of the sons of Seir, the native princes, “dukes,” of Mount Hor (Gen. 36:21, 27).

nodes.label: Ezer
nodes.description: One of the sons of Seir, the native princes, “dukes,” of Mount Hor (Gen. 36:21, 27).

nodes.label: Seir
nodes.description: A Horite; one of the “dukes” of Edom (Gen. 36:20-30).

nodes.label: Akan
nodes.description: He twists, one of the sons of Ezer, the son of Seir the Horite (1 Chr. 1:42).

nodes.label: Zavan
nodes.description: Terror, one of the “dukes of Edom” (Gen. 36:27); called also Zavan (1 Chr. 1:42).

nodes.label: Dishan
nodes.description: Antelope, the youngest son of Seir the Horite, head of one of the tribes of Idumaea (Gen. 36:21, 28, 30).

nodes.label: Lotan
nodes.description: Coverer, one of the sons of Seir, the Horite (Gen. 36:20, 29).

nodes.label: Shobal
nodes.description: The second son of Seir the Horite; one of the Horite “dukes” (Gen. 36:20).

verses.text: And Dishon, and Ezer, and Dishan: these are the dukes of the Horites, the children of Seir in the land of Edom.
The children of Ezer are these; Bilhan, and Zaavan, and Akan.
Duke Dishon, duke Ezer, duke Dishan: these are the dukes that came of Hori, among their dukes in the land of Seir.
And the sons of Seir; Lotan, and Shobal, and Zibeon, and Anah, and Dishon, and Ezer, and Dishan.
The sons of Ezer; Bilhan, and Zavan, and Jakan. The sons of Dishan; Uz, and Aran.
